name: Fortune Funny Bone
description: Fortune Funny Bone is the St. Patrick's Day counterpart of Funny Bone in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He is available on March 2015.
biography: Fortune Funny Bone is the St. Patrick's Day counterpart of Funny Bone in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He is available on March 2015.
quote: Glimpse the gleam of gold with Fortune Funny Bone!

content: Glimpse the gleam of gold with Fortune Funny Bone!

trivia: He is the second St. Patrick's day counterpart in Lost Islands (the first being Lucky Boomer).
